title: helianthella durangensis
intro: Helianthella durangensis, also known as Durango sunflower or yellow daisy, is a small, perennial plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The herbal preparations of Helianthella durangensis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, minor cuts, and wounds.
